_comment: Owned-inventory verbs over StrategyState.Get().OwnedItems (Il2CppMenace.Strategy.OwnedItems). AddItem/RemoveItem/GetInstances are overloaded or list-returning, so they live in Strategy/Inventory.cs.

verbs.name: InstanceCount
verbs.summary: How many owned instances of the given item template the campaign holds.

verbs.name: UnlockedItemsWithTag
verbs.summary: How many unlocked owned items carry the given tag.

verbs.name: PurchasedDossiers
verbs.summary: How many dossiers of the given actor type the campaign has purchased.

verbs.name: IsNew
verbs.summary: Whether the given owned item template is still flagged as new (unseen).

verbs.name: ItemByGuid
verbs.summary: The owned item instance with the given guid, or null.

verbs.name: MarkAsSeen
verbs.summary: Clear the new (unseen) flag on the given owned item template.
